slice_policy.default_goal: Advance exactly one completed in-game week for the active persona unless a major blocker or especially high-signal audit event happens first.
slice_policy.detail_log_policy: Write one canonical per-slice detail file per completed week and keep the progress report concise.

next_slice: Resume Persona A from the saved authoritative replay checkpoint at the end of Week 8 turn summary (`₡844 / Debt ₡0 / Hunger 20% / Sanity 30%`, no active conditions). last_run.summary: A fresh-context slice resumed Persona A from the authoritative Week 7 summary, found no opening event, hit the `BROKEN AUTO-CHEF` labor-screen event, chose the safe `₡20` protein bar, completed `Work Shift x3`, returned home, and closed Week 8 at ₡844 / Debt 0 / Hunger 20% / Sanity 30% with `Sore Legs` cleared on the authoritative replay timeline.
